message:
test(fj-conformance): add Gather/Scatter oracle tests

Add 33 conformance tests for Gather and Scatter primitives covering:
- 1D and 2D operations
- Shape validation (slice_sizes must match operand rank)
- Update shape requirements for Scatter
- Error cases: out-of-bounds, dtype mismatch, shape mismatch
- Edge cases: single element, duplicate indices, large values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
